scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const f='../api-zod/src/index.ts'; require('fs').writeFileSync(f, \"export * from './generated/api';\\n\"); const g='../api-zod/src/generated/api.ts'; require('fs').writeFileSync(g, require('fs').readFileSync(g,'utf8').replace(/zod\\.instanceof\\(File\\)/g,'zod.any()'));" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
